deals.Description: An AI startup building open-source AI systems and infrastructure for training, fine-tuning, and deploying AI models, including a new data center in France.
deals.Investors: Bpifrance, BNP Paribas, Crédit Agricole CIB, HSBC, La Banque Postale, MUFG, Natixis CIB
deals.Founders: Arthur Mensch, Guillaume Lample, Timothée Lacroix

deals.Description: An open-source orchestration platform unifying data, AI, infrastructure, and business workflows, aiming to expand in North America and Europe.
An AI-powered app that identifies objects and surroundings in real-time to enhance city accessibility for visually impaired individuals.
